title: Message delivery case: provider outage or local credential issue
incident_summary: Transactional delivery fell to 61%, and the evidence supports two plausible explanations.

alerts.title: SMTP auth failures
alerts.content: SMTP AUTH failures increased 18x in transactional mail workers.

alerts.title: Provider latency elevated
alerts.content: Provider API latency elevated in one zone but without widespread 5xx.

logs.title: Invalid SMTP credentials
logs.content: mailer-worker auth failed: 535 authentication credentials invalid.

logs.title: Sporadic 502s
logs.content: Occasional 502 from provider edge in non-primary region.

logs.title: Secret refresh hook skipped
logs.content: worker did not reload rotated smtp_secret due to stale checksum cache.

runbook_snippets.title: SMTP secret refresh
runbook_snippets.content: Force worker secret refresh and restart deployment to pick rotated credentials.

runbook_snippets.title: Provider failover
runbook_snippets.content: Fail over to secondary provider only if primary provider wide outage confirmed.

runbook_snippets.title: Failed message replay
runbook_snippets.content: After credential fix, replay failed transactional messages from retry-safe queue.

timeline_notes.title: SMTP secret rotated
timeline_notes.content: SMTP credentials rotated 25 minutes before auth failures.

red_herrings: Provider dashboard shows latency warning that does not align with authentication errors.
true_root_cause: SMTP credentials rotated but email workers kept stale secret
true_root_cause_aliases: credential rotation not reloaded in mailer
true_mitigation: Reload workers with updated SMTP secret and requeue failed messages
true_mitigation_aliases: restart mailer workers after secret refresh
apply new smtp creds and replay failed sends
